description: Modernize Contoso's batch-heavy analytics platform on Azure: ingest from operational stores into a curated lakehouse, serve curated marts to BI tools, and tighten lineage and PII handling without freezing business reporting.
constraints: SLA-bound daily mart refresh; downtime windows limited to Sundays
EU resident data stays in approved EU regions
No shadow copies of PII in dev — synthetic or masked only
assumptions: Source systems expose CDC or append-only change feeds within 15 minutes
Canonical business glossary exists but is not yet wired to technical metadata
inlineRequirements: Document backfill strategy and cutover checklist before production promotion

documents.name: fictional-source-inventory.txt
documents.content: Fictional inventory: ERP extract, clickstream bucket, partner file drops — volumes and owners are illustrative.

topologyHints: Separate raw and trusted zones; enforce ABAC-style classifications at store boundaries
Prefer private endpoints for storage and SQL endpoints
securityBaselineHints: Encrypt all data at rest with customer-managed keys where contracts require
Break-glass access for ops is time-bound and audited
